scores.correctness_notes: The agent never actually produces the requested complete YAML. It describes the layer structure in tables and prose, and provides Python code, but omits the actual YAML artifact that was explicitly requested. The gold standard is a complete, runnable YAML file.
scores.hallucination_notes: none — fields mentioned (override, command, startup, on-check-failure, on-failure, user/group, checks with http, log-targets with loki) are all valid Pebble layer spec fields
